title: Complete the EDS 2.0 component library 📦
description:
- ✅ Update previously released components to component-owned CSS typography
- 🏗️ Build all new Q2 components with component-owned CSS typography from the start
- 🚢 Ship Phase 1 components
- 🚢 Ship Phase 2 components
- 🚢 Ship Phase 3 components
- 🎯 Ensure Figma components accurately reflect the code implementation
- 📚 Complete and standardise component documentation across all newly shipped components
- ♿ Ensure all shipped components meet WCAG 2.2 AA accessibility standards
